description:
Verso: Mercantile letter in Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: likely 11th century. Faded but nearly fully preserved.
Needs examination for content. 

Recto: Hebrew text, with citations such as Song of Songs 8:7. Might be a panegyric for someone (...וגאון...). (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
